title: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Advanced Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Advanced Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' fill='#F7F7F7' rx='10'/><rect x='40' y='40' width='300' height='60' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/><rect x='120' y='120' width='160' height='80' fill='#C06C88' rx='10'/><text x='170' y='140' fill='#411C56' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Recommendations</text><rect x='40' y='180' width='300' height='60' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/><g fill='#C06C88' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'><text x='50' y='210' fill='#411C56'>Category:</text><rect x='140' y='190' width='160' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='5'/><text x='220' y='210' fill='#411C56'>Brand:</text><rect x='220' y='190' width='80' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='5'/></g><rect x='40' y='220' width='300' height='60' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/><g fill='#C06C88' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'><text x='50' y='250' fill='#411C56'>Sort by:</text><rect x='140' y='240' width='80' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='5'/><text x='250' y='250' fill='#411C56'>Price:</text><rect x='240' y='240' width='60' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='5'/></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement a sophisticated filtering system with multiple criteria (category and brand)
Must update the recommendation list in real-time as the user selects different criteria

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Advanced Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify that the filtering system updates the recommendation list in real-time as the user selects different criteria.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
